entries.title: Capture RENDER thread's context classloader via Thread.currentThread().getContex
entries.oneliner: Capture RENDER thread's context classloader via Thread.currentThread().getContextClassLoader() instead of Launch.classLoader to avoid duplicate LaunchClassLoader with uninitialized Forge state.

entries.title: In injected jars, resolve MC classes via reflection anchored on non-obfuscated F
entries.oneliner: In injected jars, resolve MC classes via reflection anchored on non-obfuscated Forge's FMLClientHandler.getClient(); avoid static SRG refs to bypass deobf remapping.

entries.title: Always restart Minecraft for every native-agent .so rebuild; re-injecting into a
entries.oneliner: Always restart Minecraft for every native-agent .so rebuild; re-injecting into a live JVM is a no-op due to Agent_OnAttach guard and cached classes.

entries.title: Use static TTFs from @expo-google-fonts/nunito via jsDelivr, not variable fonts,
entries.oneliner: Use static TTFs from @expo-google-fonts/nunito via jsDelivr, not variable fonts, because ImGui's stb_truetype lacks axis support.

entries.title: Fix GTK4 stack overflow by idle-deferring shell install, TabView tab attach, pan
entries.oneliner: Fix GTK4 stack overflow by idle-deferring shell install, TabView tab attach, pane rebuilds, and lazy-loading VTE tabs to break main-loop signal reentrancy during first map.

entries.title: Keep Rc<TabController> in TabKeepalive for lazy tabs; lazy-mount heavy tabs on s
entries.oneliner: Keep Rc<TabController> in TabKeepalive for lazy tabs; lazy-mount heavy tabs on selected_page_notify; defer ListBox selection to post-map idle; avoid AdwTabBar if icon-theme recursion occurs.

entries.title: Defer GTK4 tab finish_layout until selection using Stack placeholders and idle→t
entries.oneliner: Defer GTK4 tab finish_layout until selection using Stack placeholders and idle→timeout lazy mount; avoid gating on is_visible() and bisect with minimal present() shell.

entries.title: Fix GTK4 bidirectional selection sync stack overflow by centralizing with Rc<Cel
entries.oneliner: Fix GTK4 bidirectional selection sync stack overflow by centralizing with Rc<Cell<bool>> guard and resetting via glib::idle_add_local_once.

entries.title: Use shared Rc<Cell<bool>> guard with idle_add_local_once deferral for AdwTabView
entries.oneliner: Use shared Rc<Cell<bool>> guard with idle_add_local_once deferral for AdwTabView↔ToggleButton sync; try_borrow_mut skips avoid panic on reentrant signal handlers; debounce lazy Stack mounts with building/built guards.

entries.title: Defer GTK signal guard resets via glib::idle_add_local_once, use try_borrow for
entries.oneliner: Defer GTK signal guard resets via glib::idle_add_local_once, use try_borrow for RefCell state in connect_clicked handlers, and guard start_loop with a started Cell<bool> for idempotency.

entries.title: Prove GTK overflow is signal reentrancy, not shallow Rust stack, by reproducing
entries.oneliner: Prove GTK overflow is signal reentrancy, not shallow Rust stack, by reproducing with GDB and 32–128MB stack; if libgtk frames persist, keep deferred mount/async guards and bisect tabs with stubbed finish_layout.

entries.title: Bisect GTK4 tab stack overflows by stubbing finish_layout; fix signal reentrancy
entries.oneliner: Bisect GTK4 tab stack overflows by stubbing finish_layout; fix signal reentrancy via staged idle_add_local_once deferring container clear/append and ListBox populate after attach, using SelectionMode::None then deferred Single.

entries.title: When getDeclaredMethod throws NoSuchMethodException, fall back to name-only sear
entries.oneliner: When getDeclaredMethod throws NoSuchMethodException, fall back to name-only search via getDeclaredMethods at the same class level before superclass; invoke handles subtype compatibility.
